hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == *"docs/decisions/"* ]] && [[ "$FILE" == *.md ]]; then MISSING=''; for s in '## Status' '## Context' '## Decision'; do grep -q "$s" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || MISSING="$MISSING $s"; done; if [ -n "$MISSING" ]; then echo "⚠️  ADR missing required sections:$MISSING" >&2; fi; fi
